content.en:
Thundered!!!

The dense attacks fell on Ye Tian's body, but they were all resisted by layer after layer of star-winged six-armed shields, but the outermost star-winged six-armed shield was completely shattered.

After all, the attacks of so many peak realm gods were all very top-notch peak realm gods, and it would be good if he could resist them, but naturally he couldn't keep those star-winged six-armed shields.

He also knows very well that this battle will be extremely difficult, and he will be destroyed a lot of super dimensional secret treasures, and the loss ~ loss will be extremely heavy.

But as long as you can defeat the Ice Ghost Organization, that's fine.

Otherwise, if he fails, he will not fall, but - the Terrans will be miserable.

And so.

Each of Ye Tian's duplicate bodies began to burn the Eternal Dao Seed, and even the origin of the extra-dimensional thing, if this was done, it would cause a very serious loss of the extra-dimensional thing, and it would be difficult to exert the power of the extra-dimensional thing in the future.

This is a real way to fight, but when you are in a weak position, you can only choose this way.

Rumble!!!!

Ye Tian's most powerful copy body killed the Blood Realm God, because once the Blood Degree Realm God was allowed to deal with his other copy bodies, or the Liangyi Realm God, then the Liangyi Realm God would definitely die.

After fusing the high-level extradimensional things, Ye Tian's strength surpassed that of the Blood Realm God.

No, after the Blood Realm God fought with Ye Tian's strongest copy body, his face changed, and his whole body was cracked, but he resisted with the Super Dimensional Secret Treasure.

Subsequently, the other peak realm gods of the Ice Ghost Organization came to assist the Blood Realm Gods and besieged Ye Tian's replica body together.

As time passed, the peak realm gods of the supreme power gradually began to suffer.

Moreover, the gods of the Liangyi Realm also began to get hurt.

However, with Ye Tian's desperate efforts, he continued to hit and even kill the pinnacle realm gods of the Ice Ghost Organization, which caused the Ice Ghost Organization to be under great pressure, and it was difficult to achieve victory.

Suddenly.

One of Ye Tian's replica bodies was about to fall, and before this replica body fell, he burned everything and dragged the two Ice Ghost Organization Peak Realm Gods to fall together.

......

The Boundary of the Seam.

Ye Tian's replica body stationed here learned that one of his replica bodies had fallen, and immediately began to condense the replica body.

It didn't take long for the copy body to condense, and then he took out a piece of super dimensional secret treasures, as well as Kun Realm wood fragments, and integrated them into the copy body, so that this copy body had enough combat power.

"Go!"

The replica body went to the rescue.

But not long after, another copy of Ye Tian's body fell, and he once again condensed the copy body to support.

Of course, his super secret treasure is not endless, so his combat power will continue to be reduced.

However, the pinnacle realm gods of the Ice Ghost Organization are also constantly suffering heavy losses, and their combat effectiveness is also continuing to decline.

Therefore, Ye Tian's side gradually gained an advantage.

Soon.

The Blood Realm God was a little panicked.

"Damn, how could this weak territory give birth to such a peak realm god who defies the sky, there are so many clones, and the price of refining clones is definitely not high, how many clones does he have!"

The Blood Realm God hated Ye Tian to death.

If it weren't for Ye Tian, he would have easily swept away the supreme forces in this territory.

At the same time, he was also extremely resentful of Xuandong Mountain, Ye Tian was so demonic, but Xuandong Mountain did not give specific information.

In fact, this really can't be blamed on Xuandong Mountain.

After all, before this, Ye Tian's combat power was not as good as the gods of the Liangyi Realm, even if he had multiple clones, but in front of the Ice Ghost Organization, he was also like an ant.

Therefore, Xuandong Mountain didn't care about Ye Tian at all.

But now, Ye Tian's strength has skyrocketed, and he has also fused high-level extra-dimensional things, who would have expected this!

Seeing that the peak realm gods of the Ice Ghost Organization are falling more and more, this time it must be a heavy loss, and it is impossible to recover the loss.

"Retreat! Wait until you withdraw to the headquarters, and then send more peak realm gods over!"

The god of the bloodline secretly decided.

As for sending the Peak Realm God over now, it is obviously impossible, after all, every action requires a lot of planning, and every member is planned, if the Peak Realm God is sent over temporarily, it is very likely that the enemy of the Ice Ghost Organization will be discovered, so as to find their headquarters.

So, the only option is to retreat.

Boom!!!!

The Extra-Dimensional Boundary Sealing Bead was collected by the Blood Realm God, and immediately the Blood Realm God quickly retreated with the remaining peak Realm Gods, and Ye Tian couldn't stop it.

He can injure the Blood Realm God, but it is difficult to kill the Blood Realm God.

Moreover, it makes no sense to continue to chase and kill a few more peak realm gods.

Soon.

The pinnacle realm gods of the Ice Ghost Organization retreated back to the Death Void one after another, and then quickly retreated on the treasure ship.

At this time, they can't catch up.

After that, they left through the extradimensional formation.

And Ye Tian and the others went to the super-dimensional formation arranged by Xuandong Mountain, preparing to destroy the formation, otherwise the peak realm gods of the Ice Ghost Organization would descend again.

Of course, it will take a little time for them to rush over.

After some time, they rushed there and then went all out to destroy the extradimensional formation.

Soon after, this extradimensional formation was destroyed.

At this time, they breathed a sigh of relief.

At the very least, for a short time, they were safe.

......

The realm of the gods.

Hyundong Mountain Headquarters.

At this time.

The peak realm gods of Xuandong Mountain, as well as the high-level realm gods, middle-level realm gods, beginner-level realm gods, and a large number of ordinary realm gods, were all seized by other supreme forces.

"Six Cave Realm God, why did you betray us?"

The God of the Two Rites asked.

The Six Cave Realm God said helplessly: "We can't help it, the extradimensional storm is coming, we have all fused extradimensional things and many extradimensional eras, at most we can hold on to ten extradimensional eras, if there are no resources, we can't suppress extradimensional assimilation at all." And the number of ships on the Galanbo ship is very poor, maybe sending us to the weaker extradimensional era still won't solve the problem. There are only a number of employees, and even more pits, maybe one day they will be used as cannon fodder, and there are not many employees who can really mix well. And our cooperation with the Ice Ghost Organization is also to enter a more powerful territory. "

The Liangyi Realm God didn't speak, and he also knew that what the Six Cave Realm God said was also true.

The number of followers and employees of the Garanbao ship is not necessarily a good thing for the average peak realm god, it can only be said to be a hope, but some peak realm gods would rather take risks than win a hope.

"No matter what, you have betrayed us, so you will surely die!"

The Shinto of the Liangyi Realm.

Immediately, he looked at Ye Tian.

Ye Tian is now the most powerful existence among the supreme forces, and the real right to speak depends on Ye Tian.

Ye Tian looked at the Six Cave Realm Gods and them, waved his hand and said, "Kill it!"
